utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Of course ! Only an idiot would wear this stuff if you did not have the car ! Right ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_Only an idiot would wear this stuff if you did not have the car !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That is true .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , but only a genius would swallow a sonic blaster gun .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , I have been there . Yeah , I am gonna go drive my Porsche .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Joey , you know you do not actually have one .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Come on ! What are you doing ? ! I am in character ! Would you talk to her !

emotion_cause.span: 6_What are you doing ? ! I am in character !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Ahh , I think it just moved . It is really poking me .

emotion_cause.span: 7_I think it just moved . It is really poking me .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: All right , that is it , we are going to the emergency room .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: What ? ! No , you can not , you can not leave me here with them ! We are baby ... sitting !

emotion_cause.span: 9_you can not leave me here with them ! We are baby ... sitting !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: The babies are asleep , I am sure you will be okay on your own for a while !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: But you ... you can not leave me with them ! We ... we are a team ! We are playing a zone ! They are gonna triple team me !

emotion_cause.span: 11_you ... you can not leave me with them ! We ... we are a team ! We are playing a zone ! They are gonna triple team me !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: He is got something plastic lodged in his throat , we have got to go to the hospital .

emotion_cause.span: 12_He is got something plastic lodged in his throat

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: But no , because a doctor will not be able to help him , it is just gonna you know naturally pass through his system in like seven years .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I think that is gum .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am pretty sure it is gun .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , listen this really hurts . Let go .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: A real man would not just run to the hospital ! No ! What would , what would Krog do ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: That was the only way I could get him to stop typing !

emotion_cause.span: 18_That was the only way I could get him to stop typing !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hi ! How are the Gellers ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Do not call us that !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: The judge would not let us get an annulment ! Now we gotta get a divorce ! ! Did a Porsch throw up on you ?

utterances.text: Hey ! It is Porsche ! !
